ARCH_CALL_ENGINE.description: Single CallEngine as core state machine for all call logic
rules: Voice and Video must share same engine
Caller and Callee use same flow
UI must not access infrastructure directly
LiveKit must be wrapped in MediaEngine
No direct LiveKit usage outside infrastructure
All signaling must go through SignalingService
No direct MQTT usage in UI or Engine

SEC_TOKEN_REQUIRED.description: Token validation required for call actions
rules: Token must be validated before startCall
Token must be validated before acceptCall
